title: Query with ORDER BY results in "database disk image is malformed" error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (name, value) VALUES ('test1', 1.5), ('test2', 2.5), ('test3', NULL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_name_value ON t1(name, value);
UPDATE t1 SET value = CAST('invalid' AS FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM t1 ORDER BY value;
key_bug_features: SELECT with ORDER BY on malformed database
